calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-15-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:12am
Judge Pro Tem Judge John Gulick, Jr., clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. Sarahann Shapiro, appears as counsel for appellant David Cashin. Roger R. Smith, president of Washington Court HOA, appears as respondent. Ms. Shapiro lodges a trial brief that is not identified as evidence.

Exhibit 1/R - Diagram of property in question, identified.

Other evidence is reviewed but not identified. Testimony proceeds in the narrative.
Roger R. Smith, respondent, testifies in the narrative. Ms. Shapiro, calls 1st witness Michael Lazzaretti, previously sworn, for the appellant. Ms. Shapiro calls 2nd witness, David Cashin, previously sworn, for the appellant.

10:05am
Judge Gulick, Jr. requests that parties file a brief on the matter and provides them with his FAX number and gives parties until 12/30/05. Matter is submitted and court adjourns. Exhibit 1,is returned, no other evidence is retained by the Court.
